---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement, new capability, or change in behaviour
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What pain are you trying to solve? Skip "wouldn't it be cool if…" — describe a real situation where Meshwork falls short today.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like Meshwork to do. Concrete is better than abstract: API shape, command, UI sketch, agent behaviour.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and rejected (and why).

## Scope

- [ ] Runner change
- [ ] Dashboard change
- [ ] New / modified agent
- [ ] New / modified workflow
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Other:

## Anything else

Links to prior art, related issues, real-world traces.
